REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-18-2024 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-15-2024 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-18-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joseph Fenton appeared by zoom for and with Curtis Witcher (petitioner) by zoom.

In response to the court's inquiry, Mr. Fenton stated that he is not aware if a probate case has been filed for the decedent's spouse, that he noticed the daughter and the granddaughter of the spouse, and that they are theoretically the successors in interest. Mr. Fenton also addressed the presumption in Probate Code 6124 stating that he believes the will was in the possession of the decedent, that both the decedent and the wife were found deceased in the residence, and that the decedent was known to carry a zip lock folder with his important papers in it, but it was not found. In addition, Mr. Fenton stated that there was a hoarder situation, that papers were everywhere, that his client had to hire a hazmat company, and that a copy of the will was found tucked away in a lamp shade in the bedroom which he believes indicates that the decedent was trying to not have it end up in the piles of paper. Furthermore, Mr. Fenton stated that the house was broken into, and that they are not sure what was taken. The court stated that it is satisfied with Mr. Fenton's response. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary. The lost will dated June 24, 2018 is admitted to probate. Curtis Witcher is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May 15, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of a report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will go off calendar. Frank Mahoney, III is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Aeyoung Kim. Deputy: G. Tan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-14-2023 Continued To Apr-18-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
